items.title: Assembly Elections 2026 highlights: PM Modi holds roadshow in Tamil Nadu, says DMK losing 'for sure'
items.summary: People showered flower petals on the PM Modi, who embarked on the near 1.5 km roadshow from Veppamoodu junction to Vadasery in this town, during the near one-hour event.

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Iran Threatens Retaliation Over U.S. Blockade
items.summary: Iran’s armed forces said they would attempt to expand their influence over sea lanes beyond the Strait of Hormuz if the U.S. military continued to block Iranian shipping.
